condition.right: STATE ID IS OUT OF RANGE THIS
condition.raw_text: the state ID is out of range This

then_body.raw: MOVE BLOCK-ENTRY-PROPERTY-COUNT (BLOCK-INDEX) TO LK-STATE-PRO *> The property values are computed based on the block state

body.raw: COMPUTE PROPERTY-CODE = PROPERTY-CODE * BLOCK-ENTRY-PROP *> Find the property in the state description

then_body.raw: COMPUTE LK-STATE-ID = BLOCK-ENTRY-MINIMUM-STATE-ID (BLOCK-IND ACK GRAM Blocks-FromDescription Blocks-ForStateId --- the block registry ID for a given block state ID In the case of ICATION DIVISION -ID Blocks-ForStateId VISION

condition.right: BLOCK STATE IDS BELONG TO THE SAME BLOCK TYPE ICATION DIVISION -ID BLOCKS-COMPAREBLOCKTYPE VISION
condition.raw_text: two block state IDs belong to the same block type ICATION DIVISION -ID Blocks-CompareBlockType VISION
